title: Google API OAuth callback failure
symptom: Users are unable to activate Google API credentials in n8n due to OAuth callback issues. This results in failed authentication attempts when trying to connect to Google services.
applies_when: Configured OAuth credentials in Google Cloud Console
not_this_if: Credentials are working in other environments
No OAuth integration is being used
root_cause: The OAuth callback fails when the `WEBHOOK_URL` or `N8N_HOST` environment variables are incorrectly set in the n8n configuration. This prevents Google from redirecting back to the n8n instance after user authentication.
fix_steps: Ensure that `N8N_HOST`, `N8N_PORT`, `N8N_PROTOCOL`, and `WEBHOOK_URL` are set correctly.
Restart your n8n instance to apply the changes.
agent_instruction: Check and correct the environment variables related to the Google API integration in your n8n configuration.
